text:
Full Production Readiness Checklist
1. CRITICAL BLOCKERS (Must Fix Before Deployment)

These are the biggest blockers preventing stable production release.

Backend Stability
 Fix all integration test failures (80 failing errors)
 Resolve async event loop conflicts
 Fix Runner.run() lifecycle conflicts
 Make CI/CD pass consistently
 Reach minimum 85% quality gate
 Stabilize benchmark tests in CI
 Ensure P99 latency consistently stays under 300ms
Multi-Modal AI Engine
 Complete fusion engine
 Fix failing multimodal tests
 Complete gait analysis integration
 Finish behavioral recognition module
 Add confidence calibration layer
 Add fallback handling for missing modalities
Payments & Billing
 Fix Stripe webhook edge cases
 Implement retry-safe webhooks
 Add idempotency validation
 Add failed-payment recovery flows
 Complete subscription lifecycle handling
 Add invoice generation
 Add taxation support (GST/VAT)
 Add enterprise billing support
Security Gaps
 Replace simulated homomorphic encryption
 Implement real MPC instead of placeholders
 Replace TEE mocks with real SGX/SEV
 Add hardware HSM support
 Add runtime attestation
 Add tamper verification
 Add real threat intelligence feeds
2. INFRASTRUCTURE & DEPLOYMENT
Docker & Containers
 Finalize Docker Compose
 Ensure Redis container stability
 Create production Dockerfiles
 Add multi-stage builds
 Optimize image size
 Add health checks
 Add startup dependency ordering
 Add container restart policies
Kubernetes
 Finalize Helm charts
 Configure HPA autoscaling
 Configure ingress controller
 Configure TLS certificates
 Add pod disruption budgets
 Add rolling deployments
 Configure secrets management
 Add namespace isolation
 Add node affinity rules
 Configure GPU scheduling
Cloud Infrastructure
 Finalize AWS/GCP/Azure architecture
 Configure VPC networking
 Configure private subnets
 Configure NAT gateways
 Configure WAF
 Configure CDN
 Configure object storage
 Configure backups
 Configure disaster recovery
 Configure multi-region failover
3. DATABASE & STORAGE
PostgreSQL
 Finalize migrations
 Add migration rollback testing
 Add DB backup automation
 Add PITR recovery
 Add connection pool tuning
 Add query optimization
 Add DB monitoring
 Add failover replicas
 Add replication testing
Redis
 Configure Redis Sentinel
 Configure persistence
 Configure Redis clustering
 Add Redis monitoring
 Add cache invalidation strategy
 Add failover testing
Vector Database
 Optimize pgvector indexes
 Benchmark ANN search
 Add embedding versioning
 Add vector consistency validation
4. AI/ML PIPELINE
Model Deployment
 Finalize ONNX runtime optimization
 Add TensorRT optimization
 Add model versioning
 Add model rollback
 Add shadow deployments
 Add A/B model testing
 Add inference batching
 Add GPU utilization optimization
AI Reliability
 Add hallucination controls
 Add confidence scoring
 Add anomaly detection
 Add adversarial attack protection
 Add model drift monitoring
 Add bias monitoring
 Add explainability validation
Federated Learning
 Finalize OTA updates
 Add node trust scoring
 Add secure aggregation hardening
 Add edge rollback system
5. SECURITY HARDENING
Authentication
 Add hardware MFA support
 Add WebAuthn/passkeys
 Add device fingerprinting
 Add session anomaly detection
 Add impossible-travel detection
API Security
 Add API gateway
 Add rate limiting policies
 Add API abuse protection
 Add request signing
 Add replay attack prevention
Encryption
 Replace all simulation crypto
 Add FIPS-compliant encryption
 Add HSM integration
 Add quantum-safe roadmap
 Add key escrow policy
Compliance
 Complete SOC 2
 Begin ISO 27001 implementation
 Add audit evidence collection
 Add compliance automation
6. FRONTEND PRODUCTION READINESS
UI Stability
 Fix all Jest/RTL failures
 Add frontend coverage reports
 Reach >80% coverage
 Fix mobile responsiveness gaps
 Optimize performance
 Add lazy loading
 Add skeleton loaders
User Experience
 Add onboarding flows
 Add guided setup
 Add admin tutorials
 Add error recovery UX
 Add offline handling
Enterprise Dashboard
 Complete missing alert types
 Add live threat dashboards
 Add SIEM integrations
 Add SOC monitoring view
7. OBSERVABILITY & MONITORING
Monitoring
 Expand Prometheus metrics
 Add distributed tracing
 Add OpenTelemetry
 Add Grafana alerts
 Add uptime monitoring
Logging
 Centralize logs
 Add log retention policy
 Add audit retention
 Add forensic export tooling
Incident Response
 Add incident runbooks
 Add auto-remediation
 Add PagerDuty escalation
 Add alert severity routing
8. DEVOPS & CI/CD
Pipeline
 Fix failing CI jobs
 Add parallelized testing
 Add staging environments
 Add canary deployments
 Add rollback automation
Quality Gates
 Enforce linting
 Enforce security scans
 Add dependency scans
 Add container vulnerability scans
 Add SBOM generation
9. PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION
Backend
 Optimize async operations
 Optimize DB queries
 Reduce API latency
 Add request caching
 Add connection reuse
GPU
 Optimize inference pipelines
 Add GPU memory management
 Add multi-GPU orchestration
10. ENTERPRISE FEATURES
Multi-Tenant SaaS
 Finalize tenant isolation
 Add enterprise quotas
 Add usage metering
 Add organization analytics
Enterprise Integrations
 Add SAML support
 Add LDAP/AD integration
 Add SIEM connectors
 Add Slack/MS Teams integrations
11. DOCUMENTATION
Technical Docs
 API documentation
 Architecture diagrams
 Deployment guides
 Recovery procedures
 Security documentation
Business Docs
 SLA documents
 Privacy policy
 Terms of service
 Compliance documentation
12. TESTING REQUIREMENTS
Backend Testing
 Unit tests >90%
 Integration tests stable
 Load testing
 Chaos testing
 Penetration testing
Frontend Testing
 E2E automation
 Cross-browser testing
 Accessibility testing
13. FINAL GO-LIVE CHECKLIST
Before Launch
 Production secrets rotated
 Backups verified
 DR drills completed
 Monitoring enabled
 Incident team prepared
 SSL certificates verified
 DNS configured
 Rate limits enabled
 CDN enabled
 WAF enabled


complete all remaining part of this plan
